cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1911 · 朝鮮 敎育 令
cover.subtitle:
보통학교 4년,
칼 찬 교사의 시대.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. Dark blue-gray, crimson accent, sepia. ONE Japanese male teacher in dark Western suit and round glasses, with a long sword (saber) hanging from his belt, standing in front of a wooden chalkboard, profile view. Three small Korean children silhouettes seated at low desks in white traditional clothes facing him. Background: a wooden colonial schoolhouse interior with a single window. Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black, accent of crimson on the saber sheath. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.name: 칼 찬 교사
items.desc: 군인 출신 교사 배치, 무단 통치 상징.

items.name: 심상소학교
items.desc: 민족 동화 의도, 일본어 강제 상용.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 각 교육령 시기와 통치기(무단·문화·민족말살) 매칭, 보통학교 수업 연한, 조선어 교육 폐지(4차령), 심상소학교 명칭 변화가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small chalkboard silhouette suggesting school. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
